taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Full Stack Engineer
core_skills: Full stack web development, Object-oriented programming, PHP, Relational databases, MySQL
skill_match_scores: Full stack web development:1.0, Object-oriented programming:1.0, PHP:0.5, Relational databases:1.0, MySQL:1.0
must_have_quals: 2+ years of professional full stack web development experience, Object-oriented programming (we're mostly PHP), Relational databases (we use MySql), Modern JavaScript frameworks such as Angular, React, or Vue (we use Vue), JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and/or MVC Frameworks, Unit and integration testing methodologies, Distributed system architecture and asynchronous processing using queues (AWS SQS), Automated production logging, monitoring and alerting, Agile development
preferred_quals: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science or related field preferred (or equivalent experience)
core_responsibilities: You will join a team of full stack engineers to build new features for our web applications, as well as support and maintain them, You should expect to move up and down the software stack, writing client-side JavaScript, HTML, and CSS, server-side PHP and the SQL statements for the products you release, Collaborate with Product, UX and other engineering teams to solve difficult problems and design new features, Scope out technical designs that enable your team to execute on proposed solutions, Upgrade legacy apps and code to modern frameworks and technologies, Mentor junior engineers and promote a culture of learning and teaching, Embrace an agile development process that emphasizes test automation, code reviews, and fast release cycles, Be a communicator! Have opinions and the ability to justify them - we want to know what you think
job_summary: Waystar is a company that simplifies healthcare payments through a smart platform and better experience. They are seeking a Software Engineer II to join their team, responsible for building scalable software frameworks, supporting web applications, and mentoring junior engineers.
